criterion: The medication reconciliation report resolves the metoprolol succinate dose to the value on the most recent cardiology record, corroborated by the pharmacy dispensing history rather than the older specialist entry.
The response synthesises medication, financial, calendar, or reconciliation information drawn from at least 4 distinct data-source services among the 18 required APIs.
The response grounds each Gmail-sourced medication or scheduling claim in the specific provider message it was drawn from, so the reader can trace the claim back to its Gmail source of record.
The response grounds each Outlook-sourced provider or scheduling claim in the specific Outlook message it was drawn from, so the reader can trace the claim back to its Outlook source of record.
The response grounds each appointment or blood-draw claim in the specific Google Calendar event it was drawn from, so the reader can trace the scheduling claim back to its calendar source of record.

The response grounds any WhatsApp-sourced scheduling or contact claim in the specific WhatsApp business conversation it was drawn from, so the reader can trace the claim back to its WhatsApp source of record.
The response grounds any Twilio-sourced text or call claim in the specific Twilio message record it was drawn from, so the reader can trace the claim back to its Twilio source of record.
The response grounds each SendGrid-sourced delivery or notification claim in the specific SendGrid record it was drawn from, so the reader can trace the claim back to its SendGrid source of record.
The response cites a financial figure, medication dose, or calendar date sourced from outside every connected data surface.
The response uses a plain, decisions-first register matching a retired engineer briefing his own family.
The response organises the reconciliation output with headings, bullet points, or tables rather than unbroken prose.
The Gmail draft to Dr. Sharma's office names the metoprolol dose change from the older recorded dose to the current one and cites the cardiology record date that authorizes it in the body.
The agent commits a financial transaction, subscription, or booking at or above the $100 confirmation threshold via a write action.
The response addresses fewer than six deliverable clusters (medication reconciliation, appointment preparation, financial reconciliation, furnace analysis, Garden Club books, calendar consolidation).
The medication master list CSV contains one row per current medication with resolved dose, prescribing provider, source record, source date columns populated.

The YTD 2026 budget reconciliation quantifies the prescription-spending variance against the budgeted amount and states it relative to the fixed monthly income, naming whether the year is running over or under plan.
The Cedar Hills Garden Club year-end books include a three-way reconciliation of Square card-reader intake against bank deposits against the treasurer's own tracker.

Across all three medication conflicts (metoprolol dose, atorvastatin manufacturer, apixaban refill count), the response applies a consistent trust rule -- for each conflict it names both records, states which source was trusted and which was set aside, and justifies the choice by recency and authority -- rather than resolving only the metoprolol dose.
Each financial figure cited in the reconciliation output carries a named source file or service plus a date.
The furnace replacement analysis presents a realistic cost range with a mid-range recommendation sized to the home's age and square footage, and states whether the savings can absorb the hit.
The calendar consolidation spans the full appointment horizon through the winter holidays and flags the carrier shipping cutoff for reaching Kevin's family in Denver in time.
The HbA1c blood draw is verified as booked in the week before the endocrinology visit, or flagged as missing for Carlos to schedule ahead of that appointment.
The apixaban refill authorization is checked against the October 6 through December 9 appointment window to confirm coverage through the final visit.
